title: Eco Gift Cards
description: Which French eco‑friendly gift cards can I buy for a Valentine's Day gift?
narrative: The user wants environmentally responsible gift cards available in France that are appropriate for a Valentine's Day present. Relevant documents must describe cards that are marketed as 100 % ethical, ecological, or solidarity‑focused, provide information on denominations, validity periods, and whether they are digital or physical, and mention any Valentine‑themed designs or suitable occasion use. Cards lacking explicit eco‑ethical claims, not tied to the French market, or unrelated to gift‑card purchases are not relevant.

title: Lambs Apartment Rentals
description: What recent rental listings are available for 2‑bedroom apartments in Lambs, Saint‑Lo, including price, size, and key amenities?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on apartments for rent in the Lambs area of Saint‑Lo, focusing on units with two bedrooms (or equivalent 2‑room layouts). Relevant documents should provide the monthly rent, square‑meter size, and details such as furnished status, terrace, parking, heating type, and the date the listing was posted. Listings that do not specify a 2‑bedroom layout, lack price or size information, or describe other property types (studios, larger homes) are not relevant.

title: Lotus EVE Hybrid
description: What are the technical specifications, price, production status, and market availability of the Lotus EVE Hybrid, and how does it compare to other affordable hybrid cars?
narrative: The user wants concrete, verifiable information about the Lotus EVE Hybrid concept presented at the Geneva motor show, including engine details, electric motor output, fuel economy, CO2 reduction claims, projected retail price, and whether it will be produced for sale. Relevant documents must contain factual data, official press‑kit statements, or reputable automotive news that address these points, and may also provide comparable figures for other low‑cost hybrid models. Documents that only contain marketing slogans, unrelated brand listings, or generic site navigation are not relevant.

title: Veal Coconut Curry
description: How can I make a coconut‑milk curry using veal instead of pork that mimics the flavor profile of a pork Colombo recipe?
narrative: The user wants a detailed, step‑by‑step recipe that substitutes veal for pork in a coconut‑milk curry while retaining the characteristic Colombo spices (curry powder, ginger, garlic, onions) and serving suggestions (e.g., with rice or plantains). Relevant documents are those that describe a pork Colombo with coconut milk and veal‑based dishes (blanquette and paupiettes) that provide cooking techniques, ingredient lists, and tips for using Thermomix. A relevant answer must include veal as the protein, coconut milk, Colombo‑style spice mix, and clear preparation instructions (including any Thermomix options if applicable). It should also note calorie considerations if mentioned, and suggest appropriate side dishes. Documents that only describe pork Colombo without veal, or veal dishes without coconut milk, are not sufficient.

title: Micropollutant Sources
description: What everyday household products contribute to water micropollutants and how can their impact be reduced?
narrative: The user wants to learn which common household items (such as soaps, cosmetics, detergents, cleaning agents, and other synthetic chemicals) release micropollutants into wastewater, how these substances survive sewage treatment, and what practical steps consumers can take to lower their discharge. Relevant content should describe the nature of these synthetic substances, their pathways to lakes and rivers, their environmental effects, and suggested consumer‑level mitigation measures.

title: Eco Boat Heating
description: What eco‑friendly heating options are suitable for small sailing vessels such as the jute‑fiber boat Tara Tari?
narrative: The user is looking for compact, low‑emission heating systems that can be safely installed on small, lightweight boats (≈10‑20 m² cabin space) built from unconventional materials like jute‑fibres. Relevant documents should describe mini wood‑burning stoves, their power range (1–5 kW), fuel types (hardwood, charcoal), installation dimensions, compliance with marine safety or ecodesign standards, and any examples of similar applications on small work or service boats.

title: BMW X3 Morgins
description: What used BMW X3 vehicles are currently listed for sale in Morgins, Switzerland, including price, year, mileage and fuel type?
narrative: The user is looking for classified advertisements of pre‑owned BMW X3 cars that are located in Morgins (VS). Relevant documents must explicitly mention a BMW X3, provide the model year, odometer reading, and the asking price (or indicate that the price is negotiable). Information about fuel type (e.g., diesel, gasoline, hybrid) and other key specs such as transmission or condition is also desirable. Listings that do not reference a BMW X3, are outside the Morgins area, or lack essential details (price, year, mileage) are not relevant.

title: Compulsory School Debate
description: What are the legal definitions, historical background, and arguments for and against compulsory schooling in France?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information that clarifies the distinction between compulsory education and compulsory schooling in French law, outlines the historical development of mandatory education, and presents both supportive and critical viewpoints on the policy. Relevant documents should include legal descriptions, historical context, and commentary or debate points that argue for or against mandatory school attendance.

title: Unemployment Option Right
description: What are the eligibility criteria, application procedure, and impact on benefit amounts of the French unemployment “right of option” after the 2020‑2021 reforms?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the “right of option” (option de droit) for French job‑seekers, including the conditions that must be met (e.g., unexhausted rights, minimum allowance thresholds, increase of at least 30 %), how to request it from Pôle Emploi, and how the recent reform (July 2021 degressivity, new calculation method) alters the amount and duration of benefits. Relevant documents are those that describe the mechanism, eligibility rules, procedural steps, and examples of benefit calculations before and after the reform.

title: Veolia Account Setup
description: How can I create and access a Veolia Water client space to manage my water services online?
narrative: The user wants a complete, step‑by‑step guide for opening a Veolia Water online client account and using the portal. Relevant content must describe the URL (service-client.veoliaeau.fr), the "Create Customer Space" link, required fields (postal code, personal data, email, phone), validation steps, activation/confirmation, handling common errors (captcha, wrong codes), login procedure, password‑recovery process, and the main functionalities available after login (paying bills, reporting a move, submitting meter readings, tracking consumption, managing subscription contracts). Contact information for customer service (phone numbers, email form, mailing address) is also relevant. Any information that does not pertain to creating, logging into, or using the Veolia Water client space is not relevant.

title: EV Purchase Decision
description: What factors should I evaluate when selecting an electric car that fits my daily commuting needs and occasional long‑distance trips?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of criteria for choosing an electric vehicle, including cost of ownership, range/autonomy, charging infrastructure, environmental benefits, and model-specific features. Relevant documents include Francis Demoz’s discussion of the electric car’s economic and ecological advantages, forum anecdotes about real‑world autonomy, and the 2022 “Top 10 electric cars” article that compares models, prices, battery capacities, and practical considerations for different usage patterns.

title: Swedish Potato Choice
description: Which potato variety provides the optimal texture and flavor for Swedish‑style baked potatoes with butter, garlic, and breadcrumbs?
narrative: The user wants guidance on selecting a potato type (e.g., Monalisa, shot/early potatoes, pomegranate potatoes) that will hold together, develop a creamy interior, and develop a golden crust when prepared using the Swedish‑style oven method described (thinly sliced, butter‑garlic basted, topped with Parmesan and breadcrumbs). Relevant information includes characteristics of different varieties (size, shape, moisture, resistance to over‑cooking), seasonal availability, and any preparation tips that affect the final dish.

title: Future Earth Vision
description: What artistic, religious, and technological descriptions exist that depict how Earth looks now and will look in the next ten years?
narrative: The user seeks sources that portray Earth's appearance and transformation from multiple perspectives: a poetic vision of the next decade, a biblical account of creation, and modern tools like Google Earth that visualise the planet today. Relevant documents should discuss future or timeless imagery of Earth, compare imaginative or theological descriptions with scientific/technological visualisations, and provide insight into how humanity conceptualises Earth's past, present, and possible future.

title: Burnout Guide
description: What resources describe the "Crapauds Fous" (toad) metaphor and related tools for recognizing, preventing, and recovering from workplace burnout?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the Crapauds Fous initiative, including its manifesto, the free "Burn out the rules of the I(u)" survival guide, community groups like Stress Fighters, and any actionable advice that uses the toad metaphor to address burnout. Relevant documents should explain the metaphor, outline burnout symptoms, and provide concrete steps or downloadable resources for individuals and organizations.

title: Avatar sequel availability
description: Where can I watch the full French‑dubbed series "The Legend of Korra", the sequel to "Avatar: The Last Airbender", and which seasons are currently accessible?
narrative: The user is looking for reliable sources or platforms that provide the complete, French‑dubbed (VF) episodes of "The Legend of Korra", including information on which seasons are available and any known broken or missing links. title: Strike Cancellation Details
description: What specific written commitments from the French government and management caused the FO and CGT unions to call off their planned truck drivers' strike in December 2018?
narrative: The user seeks documents that explain the exact promises or assurances—such as guarantees on overtime premium rates, legal protections, and any ministerial statements—that were provided to the unions and led them to lift the strike call. narrative: The user seeks a current inventory of used Land Rover vehicles advertised by the JFC Normandy dealership in Caen, France. title: Crispy Sautéed Potatoes
description: What are the best techniques and potato varieties to achieve perfectly crisp sautéed (rissolées) potatoes without them breaking down?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step guide that explains how to prepare sautéed or rissolées potatoes that are golden‑brown and crispy on the outside while staying intact on the inside. Instructions that mention avoiding pre‑boiling, using high heat oil, covering briefly to steam, and preventing over‑stirring are considered relevant, as are tips for troubleshooting common problems like potatoes falling apart.

title: Charenton Wine Shops
description: What wine shops (caves) are located in Charenton, Paris, and what are their addresses, opening hours, and specialties?
narrative: The user is looking for a concise list of wine cellars or wine shops in the Charenton area of Paris. title: Green Energy Comparison
description: What are the most affordable and truly renewable electricity and gas offers for a French household, including contract terms and promotional discounts?
narrative: The user wants to identify and compare French energy suppliers that provide 100% renewable electricity (and optionally biogas) while offering the lowest overall cost for a residential consumer. description: What are the current promotions, prices, and financing options for Kia vehicles at the Edenauto dealership in Bordeaux?
narrative: The user is seeking up‑to‑date information on Kia sales incentives at Edenauto in Bordeaux, including model‑specific offers, discounted prices, monthly financing rates, and the validity period of each promotion. title: Idéfix Series
description: When is the Idéfix animated series scheduled to launch, how many episodes will it have, and which studios are producing it?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about the new 3‑D animated series featuring Idéfix, the dog from Asterix and Obelix. title: Lisbon Car Rental
description: What are the cheapest car‑rental options in Lisbon for a specific pick‑up date that include unlimited mileage and no hidden fees?
narrative: The user wants to compare car‑rental offers for Lisbon, focusing on the total price (taxes, insurance, airport charges included), unlimited mileage, and transparent terms. title: Nantes 2‑room rent
description: What furnished two‑room apartments are available in Nantes city centre for up to €900 per month, including details on charges, deposit, and availability?
narrative: The user seeks a rental listing for a 2‑piece (two‑room) apartment located in the centre of Nantes (postal code 44000). The apartment should be furnished, have a size of roughly 45‑50 m², and the total monthly cost (rent plus charges) must not exceed €900. Relevant information includes the base rent, monthly charges (e.g., waste tax, utilities), security deposit, any optional garage fees, accessibility features (e.g., PMR access), and immediate availability. Listings that mention these criteria, such as the property offered by CABINET ST PASQUIER IMMOBILIER with a rent of €835 + €65 charges, are considered relevant, while unrelated documents about car rentals or gaming events are not.

title: Potato Toxicity
description: What health hazards do rotten, green, or sprouted potatoes pose to humans, and how have these risks been linked to historical potato crises?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on the toxic compounds (e.g., solanine, glycoalkaloids) found in deteriorating potatoes, including symptoms, exposure routes (ingestion and inhalation), and safety precautions, as well as historical examples where potato-related toxicity contributed to famines or deaths. Documents that discuss the toxic gas from rotting potatoes, the dangers of green or sprouted tubers, and the 19th‑century European potato blight and its social impact are all considered relevant.

title: Organic Vineyard Tours

narrative: The user is planning a wine‑tour focused on sustainably produced wines. title: Dominican Boat Night

title: Renault Modus Trim
description: What are the step‑by‑step instructions and required tools to safely remove and replace the decorative trim (embellishments) on a Renault Modus?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed guide for taking off the trim pieces from a Renault Modus wheel rim and installing new ones. Documents that provide this procedural information, tool recommendations, and tips for protecting the vehicle’s appearance are considered relevant.

title: Vicky Leandros Discography
description: What are the details of Vicky Leandros’s multilingual recording career, including song titles, languages, album releases, and notable performances?

title: Used Car Registration
description: Which details on a vehicle registration certificate should be verified before purchasing a second‑hand car?
narrative: The user is looking for a precise checklist of the information that must appear on a vehicle’s registration certificate (or grey card) when buying a used car, such as registration number, first‑registration date, owner’s name and address, make, model, VIN, maximum laden mass, unladen weight, and the date of the last technical inspection. title: Carmarthen Heathrow Transfer
description: What vehicle options, pricing, and booking procedures are available for a private transfer from Carmarthen to London Heathrow Airport?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on private transfer services from Carmarthen to Heathrow, including the classes of cars and minibuses offered (e.g., Mercedes E, S, Viano, Sprinter), price ranges for economy and business classes, any additional services such as Meet‑and‑Greet, and how to book (hourly rental, online request, contact details). title: Sermoise Biker Crash
description: What were the circumstances, injuries, and official response to the March 14, 2019 motorcycle‑car collision in Sermoise‑sur‑Loire?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive report on the March 14, 2019 traffic accident on the D13 in Sermoise‑sur‑Loire that involved a car and a 17‑year‑old motorcyclist. title: Vienna Concert Dinner
description: What concert‑and‑dinner packages were offered at the Kursalon Wien in September 2021, including price categories, meal details, concert times, and parking information?
narrative: The user wants a complete overview of any concert‑and‑dinner deals available at Vienna's Kursalon during September 2021. narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on the pandemic situation in the Indre-et‑Loire department to assess safety, as well as a list of items that are being offered for donation nearby (e.g., in Tours, Luynes, Fondettes, etc.). title: Lung Cancer Etiology
description: What molecular mechanisms link environmental carcinogens and viral infections to specific genetic subtypes of lung adenocarcinoma?
narrative: The user is seeking scholarly information that connects external risk factors—such as hexavalent chromium exposure, HPV infection, and dietary compounds—to the molecular landscape of lung adenocarcinoma. Relevant documents should describe (1) the classification of KRAS‑mutant lung adenocarcinoma into KP, KL, and KC subgroups based on co‑occurring TP53, STK11/LKB1, and CDKN2A/B/TTF‑1 alterations; (2) evidence of HPV prevalence in lung cancer and its potential role in tumorigenesis; (3) mechanistic insights into how Cr(VI) induces metabolic reprogramming, mitochondrial dysfunction, and DNA damage in lung cells; (4) the involvement of non‑coding RNAs (miR‑516a‑5p, miR‑21, circular RNAs, lncRNAs) and telomere‑binding proteins (TPP1) in lung cancer development and therapy; and (5) any identified biomarkers or therapeutic targets that arise from these intersecting pathways. Documents meeting these criteria are considered relevant.

title: Office Transfer Workstation
description: What desktop computer specifications are recommended for handling the documentation and processes involved in transferring a public or ministerial office in France, and what are the registration fees and tax conditions for such transfers?
narrative: The user seeks guidance on selecting an Intel‑based desktop PC (CPU, RAM, storage, graphics, connectivity) that can reliably support the creation, editing, and management of legal documents related to the transfer of public or ministerial offices in France. title: Contact Sheet Guide
description: How can I create a contact sheet for black‑and‑white film using basic lab equipment and inexpensive materials?
narrative: The user wants a step‑by‑step procedure for making a contact board (contact sheet) for silver‑based photography, including required tools, exposure time testing, and handling of negatives. title: Disruptive Meaning
description: What is the definition, etymology, and typical usage examples of the adjective “disruptive” in English?

Relevant documents must describe the legal framework, procedural steps for request and agreement, and any comparative analysis of the two regimes. title: Oil-Blue Lamps

narrative: The user seeks the lowest‑cost airfare for a trip between Porto (OPO) and Faro (FAO). title: Smoked Potato Recipes
description: What are the various recipes and preparation methods for cooking smoked potatoes, including ingredient lists, cooking times, and possible variations?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on how to make smoked potatoes. title: Telework Termination
description: When, under French law and the May 2020 de‑confinement protocol, may an employer require employees to stop teleworking and return to the workplace?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information on the legal conditions that allow French employers to end telework arrangements after 11 May 2020.
